_comment: Harvested from sys/controllers/workflow/Leftblock.php (static palette) + real VizWorkflow docs. Key = legacy w_objects[].type string. obj_id: null means dynamic (Mongo _id of the target function/workflow).

datatransfer.label: Get Parameters
datatransfer.description: Entry/trigger block. Receives workflow input parameters. Reference inputs as {Label.param}.

condition.label: Conditional Block
condition.description: Branching. message holds an expression like '{Left.field}==value'. Ops: == != < >. Routes to target_yes/target_no.

setvariable.label: Set Variable
setvariable.description: Sets workflow variables. variables is 'k=v;k2=v2'. Values may use {Ref} templates and {%helpers%}. Often used as final output payload.

genericpost.label: Generic POST
genericpost.description: HTTP POST API entry point. Used as entry block for API-triggered workflows (auth_required 0/1). Incoming JSON fields readable as {Label.field}.

genericget.label: Generic GET
genericget.description: Makes an outbound HTTP GET request to an external URL. Use for calling external APIs, webhooks, or fetching data. Config: url, headers. Output: {Label.Body.*}, {httpcode}. Follow with condition on {httpcode}==200.

return.label: Return
return.description: Ends the workflow and returns data to caller.

chatfileupload.label: File Upload
chatfileupload.description: Uploads files into a chat stream.

customoutput.label: Custom Output
customoutput.description: Formats the API response (outputDataType json/text, headerStatusCode).

realtimepush.label: Realtime Push
realtimepush.description: Pushes data to WebSocket clients for realtime UI updates.

sendmail.label: Send Mail
sendmail.description: Sends an email. Keys: mail_to, mail_from, mail_subject, mail_content, attachment. Values may use {Ref} templates.

roverai.label: XAgent for Extraction
roverai.description: LLM extraction agent (Rover AI). Config: project, searchsource, goal, question, instructions.

ssdatafilter.label: Spreadsheet Filter
ssdatafilter.description: Reads rows from a spreadsheet matching filters. Output fields = spreadsheet columns, referenced as {Label.Column}. Sets {filter-count}.

insertssdata.label: Spreadsheet Data Insert
insertssdata.description: Inserts a row. Column values via properties.field-mapping [{keyvalue, insertcolumn}].

insertorupdatessdata.label: Spreadsheet Data Insert Or Update
insertorupdatessdata.description: Upserts a row matched by filters; sets values via field-mapping.

updatessdata.label: Spreadsheet Data Update
updatessdata.description: Updates rows matched by filters; sets values via properties.field-mapping.

tospreadsheet.label: Convert To Spreadsheet
tospreadsheet.description: Writes previous block output matrix into a new spreadsheet.

processfile.label: Process File
processfile.description: Parses/processes an uploaded file (CSV/Excel rows etc.).

downloadasfile.label: Download as File
downloadasfile.description: Returns data as a downloadable file (download-filename, download-filetype).

createfile.label: Create File
createfile.description: Creates a file with given content.

adduser.label: Add/Edit User
adduser.description: Creates or updates a platform user account. Use for user registration, onboarding, profile updates. Required config: email, systemrole. Optional: fname, lname, pwd, group, sendmail. Output: {Label.uid}, {Label.email}.

getuser.label: Get User Details
getuser.description: Looks up a platform user by email. Use to check if user already exists before adduser. Required config: email. Output: {Label.email}, {Label.fname}, {Label.uid}.

addusertolivespace.label: Add User to App
addusertolivespace.description: Grants a user access to a specific app/livespace. Use AFTER adduser for onboarding. Required config: email, lid (or livespace_shortcode). Optional: livespacerole. Output: {Label.status}.

setlanding.label: Set User Landing Page
setlanding.description: Sets the landing page for a user.

arrayextract.label: Array Extract Block
arrayextract.description: Extracts values from data via regex/selector. Keys: regex, data_selector, output_key, sort_order. Output referenced as {Label.output_key}.

clearoutput.label: Clear Output Block
clearoutput.description: Clears the accumulated output buffer. Commonly inserted after conditions and before livecloud/output blocks.

backgroundworkflow.label: Background Workflow
backgroundworkflow.description: Triggers an async child workflow (wfShortCode, workflowParameters).

date.label: Date
date.description: Date manipulation and formatting. Use for calculating due dates, comparing timestamps, reformatting dates. Config: input_date, informat, outformat, operator, time. Output: {Label.value}.

livecloudfunction.label: LiveCloud Function
livecloudfunction.description: Invokes a LiveCloud function/endpoint. obj_id = the function's Mongo _id. Inputs via properties.field-mapping. Sets {httpcode}; response fields as {Label.field}.

executeworkflow.label: Execute Workflow
executeworkflow.description: Runs a child workflow synchronously. obj_id = child workflow Mongo _id; requires its short_code. Supports loop over a namespace.
